items.title: Drake London: Inks extension with Falcons
items.body_text: London has agreed to a four-year extension with the Falcons, Ian Rapoport of NFL Network reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Makai Lemon: Dealing with hamstring injury
items.body_text: Lemon did not participate in Tuesday's practice due to a hamstring injury, Brooks Kubena of The Athletic reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Aaron Donald: Considering return to NFL
items.body_text: Donald told Pat McAfee of The Pat McAfee Show on Tuesday that the Rams' acquisition of Myles Garrett on Monday "for sure got [him] thinking" of coming out of retirement. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Tetairoa McMillan: Remains idle with foot injury
items.body_text: McMillan (foot) remains sidelined for Tuesday's practice, Joe Person of The Athletic reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Josh Jacobs: Practicing with team Tuesday
items.body_text: Jacobs is participating in Tuesday's practice, Matt Schneidman of The Athletic reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
